headline: Here's Why Phillips 66's Refining Strength Supports Long-Term Growth
summary: PSX's access to low-cost crude and an efficient refining network positions it to benefit from rising fuel demand and stronger refining margins.

headline: Citigroup Maintains Neutral on Marathon Petroleum, Raises Price Target to $303
summary: Citigroup  analyst Vikram Bagri   maintains Marathon Petroleum (NYSE:MPC) with a Neutral and raises the price target from $257 to $303.

headline: Oil Is at $72. Diesel Is Pricing In $140. That's the Inflation Warning Wall Street May Be Missing.
summary: Crude oil may look calm, but diesel markets are flashing a different inflation signal. Here's why soaring diesel crack spreads matter for investors.
